limitations: NumberOfCycle is an order index, not a wall-clock timestamp.
Legacy static process settings are context, not verified actions.
CycleToFailure and CycleToFailureNormalized are forbidden as inputs.
This report audits a manifest; it does not reproduce model metrics.

columns.description: Cycle/order index, not a wall-clock timestamp.
columns.name: NumberOfCycle

columns.description: Future lifecycle label prohibited as model input.
columns.name: CycleToFailure

columns.description: Future lifecycle label prohibited as model input.
columns.name: CycleToFailureNormalized

columns.description: Wear class derived from future lifecycle labels.
columns.name: wear_class_name
